blogs.title: The Evolution of Commercial Interiors Post-2025
blogs.excerpt: Discover how workspace layout needs are shifting towards activity-based designs, merging safety, wellness, and modular tech.
blogs.content: In recent years, the concept of a corporate office has undergone a major transition. Workspaces are no longer just rows of desks; they are collaborative ecosystems. In this article, we look at why modular desking and acoustic partitioning have become critical tools for modern HR managers. Businesses are discovering that giving employees control over their physical environments increases performance and job satisfaction. We also explore the integration of biophilic elements, such as planter boxes, inside corporate layouts to improve indoor air quality and reduce office stress.
blogs.author: Ellipsis Design Team

blogs.title: Understanding MEP: The Backbone of Office Operations
blogs.excerpt: MEP engineering is often invisible, but it makes or breaks the workspace. Here is a breakdown of why HVAC and electrical infrastructure matter.
blogs.content: When evaluating office interiors, most people look at furniture, color schemes, and wall art. However, the true functionality of a space lies in its Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing (MEP) planning. A poorly ventilated office leads to fatigue, while inadequate electrical grids can halt daily work. In this post, we explain how Keiyan MEP design-build services integrate early in the architectural process to plan efficient layouts, reduce energy bills by up to 30%, and ensure standard-compliant fire safety networks.
blogs.author: HVAC Specialist Team

inquiries.name: Rohan Sharma
inquiries.subject: Office Fit-out & Modular Desking Quotation
inquiries.message: Hello, we are expanding our office in Bangalore and require a quotation for 120 modular workstations and meeting room furniture. We also need MEP planning for our server rooms.
